# DevOps Practices

Core operational skills for deployment, monitoring, and infrastructure.

## Deployment

- [[deploy]] — deploy application to production environment
- [[rollback-procedure]] — restore previous version when issues arise

- [[log-aggregation]] — centralize and search application logs
